title: eleocharis obtusa var. lanceolata
intro: Eleocharis obtusa var. lanceolata, commonly known as the needle spikerush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis obtusa var. lanceolata include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
